title: İtalya'nın İstanbul Başkonsolosu ve Konsolosu Üniversitemizi Ziyaret Etti
content:
Öğrenci

Haberler

Detay

Tarih: 02 Ekim 2025

-

-

The Consul General of Italy in Istanbul, Elena Clemente, and the Consul of Italy in Istanbul, Roberta Costanzo, paid a courtesy visit to our university.

During the visit, a productive and constructive meeting was held focusing on academic and cultural collaborations.

Consul General Elena Clemente and Consul Roberta Costanzo also had the opportunity to meet with students from Italy currently studying at our university within the scope of the Erasmus program.

We extend our sincere thanks to Consul General Elena Clemente and Consul Roberta Costanzo for their kind visit and valuable contributions.
